title: Modern Fast Item Frames
description: Modernizes the textures of the item frames, designed for use with the Fast Item Frames mod!
body:
# About
This resource packs updates the block and item textures and models of the item frames.

-New item texture for the _item frame_ and the _glowing item frame_, it has a more detailed sword showing, and a more square shape with a tweaked texture.
-Changed the model's texture so that instead of using birch planks texture for the frame and particles, it uses the stripped birch log, which looks better.
-Also the frame's background, which is more consistent with the new item texture, and it's not that noisy.

# Compatibility
-Designed specifically for use with the [Fast Item Frames](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-item-frames) mod by Fuzs, so that the leather of the frame can be dyed without breaking the textures.
